books.title: Conan Stories
books.author: Robert E. Howard
books.summary: A collection of Robert E. Howard’s short stories featuring Conan the Barbarian.

books.title: El Dorado
books.author: Baroness Orczy
books.summary: Two separate interests want to free the imprisoned Dauphin of France.

books.title: The Story of My Life
books.author: Helen Keller
books.summary: Helen Keller writes about her experiences as a deafblind child learning to communicate.

books.title: Recollections of Full Years
books.author: Helen Herron Taft
books.summary: Helen Herron Taft, wife of William Howard Taft, the twenty-seventh President of the United States, recalls her life married to one of America’s most influential political figures.

books.title: Pollyanna
books.author: Eleanor H. Porter
books.summary: An orphan’s unrelenting optimism sees her through adversity and lifts up her new community.

books.title: The Cords of Vanity
books.author: James Branch Cabell
books.summary: An arrogant young author makes his way through a series of love affairs, avoiding every situation that may cause unpleasantness.

books.title: Henry V
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: Shakespeare’s 1599 play chronicling the history of King Henry the Fifth and his famous victory over the French at the Battle of Agincourt.

books.title: Peter and Wendy
books.author: J. M. Barrie
books.summary: A mischievous and cocky young boy, Peter Pan, takes Wendy and her brothers on adventures on a fantasy island consisting of mermaids, pirates, Native Americans, and fairies.

books.title: Piccadilly Jim
books.author: P. G. Wodehouse
books.summary: Jimmy Crocker gets embroiled in convoluted comedic escapades, involving impersonations, kidnapping and theft, on both sides of the Atlantic.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Henry Kuttner
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Henry Kuttner, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: The Interesting Narrative of the Life of Olaudah Equiano
books.author: Olaudah Equiano
books.summary: An autobiography of an ex-slave in the mid 1700s.

books.title: A Strange Disappearance
books.author: Anna Katharine Green
books.summary: A young detective is challenged to find a missing woman in New York City.

books.title: Human Nature and Conduct
books.author: John Dewey
books.summary: Dewey applies the theory of pragmatism to morality, reason, and society.

books.title: Beyond Good and Evil
books.author: Friedrich Nietzsche
books.summary: Nietzsche’s philosophical treatise on the ambiguity of traditional morality.

books.title: The Faerie Queene
books.author: Edmund Spenser
books.summary: Six knights embodying Christian virtues embark on allegorical quests.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Maracot Deep
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.summary: A scientific expedition stumbles upon the remnants of Atlantis.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Hjalmar Söderberg
books.summary: A collection of Hjalmar Söderberg’s short stories, ordered by date of their translation.

books.title: Verses on Various Occasions
books.author: John Henry Newman
books.summary: A collection of poems by John Henry Newman.

books.title: The Mirror of the Sea
books.author: Joseph Conrad
books.summary: An autobiographical memoir on Joseph Conrad’s maritime experiences and his relationship with the sea.
